OLED Menu Coverage

This manifest mirrors the on-device OLED menu so tests can catch any function that is not represented in WebHID.

Input Mode: mode selector Output Mode: mode selector Win Mode: Settings PSX Periph: deferred NSO Mode: Settings Deadzone: Settings Analog Test: Controller DPad Mode: Settings SOCD: hidden for Classic2USB Contrast: Settings Home Screen: Settings 1P View: Settings Hotkey Hold: Settings Quick Menu: Settings System Menu: Settings Home: Settings Capture: Settings Kiosk: Settings Stick Invert: Settings Rumble: Settings/Rumble Triggers: Settings RTrig=RStick: Settings Sound: Settings Button Remap: Remap tab Button Map: Settings Z Button: Settings N64 C Buttons: Settings Wii/GC Stick Range: Settings N64 Stick Range: Settings View Mapping: Controller Screensaver: Settings Games: OLED-only Guncon Offset: deferred Power Pad: Settings JogCon Mode: controller MODE only JogCon Force: deferred Wheel Sens: deferred Dig Output: deferred Wheel Axis: deferred BT Pair: deferred Forget BT: deferred Hotkeys: deferred Factory Reset: Commands Bootloader: Commands About: Device Info

Browser Not Supported

WebHID is only supported in Chrome, Edge, and Opera. Please use one of these browsers.
